title: The weighted two-cell P0 projection is idempotent at the average level

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: For nonzero total mass, taking the weighted average of the two weighted projected coordinates gives the original weighted average.
assumptions: both weighted projected coordinates equal the weighted average
informal.expected_conclusion: The weighted average after projection equals the original weighted average.

declarations.name: weightedCellAverage2
declarations.statement: def weightedCellAverage2 (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) : Real := (m0 * u0 + m1 * u1) / (m0 + m1)

declarations.name: weightedP0Projection2_idempotent
declarations.statement: theorem weightedP0Projection2_idempotent (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 (weightedP0Projection2Left m0 m1 u0 u1) (weightedP0Projection2Right m0 m1 u0 u1) = weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1

tasks.input: Translate idempotence of the weighted two-cell P0 projection at the average level into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem weightedP0Projection2_idempotent (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 (weightedP0Projection2Left m0 m1 u0 u1) (weightedP0Projection2Right m0 m1 u0 u1) = weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1

tasks.input: Complete the Lean proof by unfolding the weighted projection and weighted average.
tasks.target: Unfold weightedP0Projection2Left, weightedP0Projection2Right, and weightedCellAverage2; use field_simp with hsum.
